name: Maya Action: Save Scene
description: Creates a Maya action to save the current scene. Chain multiple action nodes together via actions_in/actions_out, then feed the final actions_out into a Maya Headless node.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]

    save_scene_path = inputs.get('save_scene_path') or self.get_parameter('save_scene_path', '')
    file_type = inputs.get('file_type') or self.get_parameter('file_type', 'mayaAscii')

    action = {
        'type': 'save_scene',
        'save_scene_path': save_scene_path,
        'file_type': file_type
    }

    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added save_scene action -> {save_scene_path} ({file_type})')

    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
